{{Template:Event Item}}

{{CargoRelic
|name=Writ of Eternal Hunt
|rank=Green
|affct=FAME
|source= 2nd Anniversary award, from Aug. 1 - Aug. 21 2025
|description=A blood-sealed contract by a shadow syndicate, unbreakable even by the employer's death. Enforcers must complete the kill at any cost. Rooted in ancient blood oaths, it upholds the underworld's iron law through relentless pursuit.
|fame=29
|art=16
|fth=16
|civ=13
|tech=16
|ss1=All ELMT DMG +2 <br> Per Hitman intercepted, Snail ATK +1 <br> Hitmen Intercepted: 40/40
|ss2=All ELMT DMG +4 <br> Per Hitman intercepted, Snail ATK +2 <br> Hitmen Intercepted: 40/40
|ss3=All ELMT DMG +6 <br> Per Hitman intercepted, Snail ATK +3 <br> Hitmen Intercepted: 40/40
}}

[[Category:Enhanced by Hitmen Intercepted]]
[[Category:DMG Boosts]]
[[Category:ATK Boost]]
[[Category:FAME Relics]]
